name: Slido Audience Q&A and Polling Platform API
what_it_does: Slido audience Q&A and interactive polling REST API for enterprise meeting hosts, event organizers, and HR teams to embed live Q&A, polls, quizzes, and word clouds into meetings and events — enabling moderated audience questions, live polling, and engagement analytics through Slido's platform (acquired by Cisco/Webex in 2021) used in 2.5M+ events annually. Enables AI agents to manage event creation for Q&A session automation, handle poll creation for live audience input automation, access question moderation for curated Q&A automation, retrieve voting results for real-time response automation, manage word cloud for qualitative input automation, handle quiz configuration for gamified engagement automation, access analytics for event engagement reporting automation, retrieve audience insights for presenter intelligence automation, manage Webex integration for enterprise meeting engagement automation, and integrate Slido with Webex, Teams, PowerPoint, and Google Slides for end-to-end meeting engagement automation.
use_cases: Embedding live Q&A and polls into enterprise all-hands meetings for engagement automation agents
Moderating audience questions and surfacing top-voted queries for presenter assistance automation agents
Accessing Slido event analytics and engagement metrics for meeting effectiveness reporting automation agents
Integrating Slido with Webex and Teams for enterprise meeting audience engagement automation agents
not_for: Standalone quiz platforms without meeting context (Kahoot is better for gamified standalone quizzes)
Complex interactive presentations with custom slide designs (Mentimeter offers more visual flexibility)
High-volume automated survey distribution (SurveyMonkey/Typeform are better for async surveys)
best_when: An enterprise meeting host, event organizer, or HR team wanting AI agents to manage Slido Q&A sessions, polls, and engagement analytics integrated into Webex, Teams, PowerPoint, or Google Slides for live meeting engagement.
avoid_when: CISCO WEBEX ACQUISITION CHANGES API ROADMAP: Slido was acquired by Cisco in 2021 and is being integrated into Webex; automated long-term Slido standalone API investment assumption faces API consolidation risk; automated should monitor Cisco Webex Events API roadmap. ENTERPRISE PLAN REQUIRED FOR API: Slido API access requires Enterprise subscription; automated professional plan API assumption creates no API access; automated must confirm Enterprise tier access. EVENT IS TIME-SCOPED: Slido events are created with defined start/end times; automated persistent Q&A assumption creates expired event errors; automated must manage event lifecycle (create, activate, archive) appropriately. MODERATION WORKFLOW: Slido Q&A supports moderation (approve before display); automated immediate display assumption creates moderation queue buildup; automated must handle moderation state for each question.

auth.notes: Slido uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Bratislava, Slovakia HQ (Cisco/Webex). Founded 2012 by Peter Komornik, Rastislav Valo, and Andrea Homolova. Acquired by Cisco 2021. Products: Q&A, live polls, word cloud, quiz, rating scale. SDKs: None public. Integrated in Webex, PowerPoint, Google Slides, Microsoft Teams. 2.5M+ events/year. Enterprise subscription for API. GDPR, SOC 2 compliant. Competes with Mentimeter and Poll Everywhere.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier: basic Q&A with audience limit; API requires Enterprise plan
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic free, Engage $8/month, Scale $15/month, Enterprise custom; API on Enterprise
pricing.notes: Bratislava SK / Cisco. Enterprise for API. GDPR, SOC 2. 2.5M events/year.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; Q&A and polling APIs throttled per Enterprise agreement

known_agent_gotchas: CISCO ACQUISITION ROADMAP RISK: Slido is being integrated into Cisco Webex platform; automated long-term standalone Slido API assumption faces consolidation; automated should monitor Cisco Webex Events API for migration path
ENTERPRISE PLAN REQUIRED: Slido API requires Enterprise subscription; automated lower-tier API assumption creates 403 Forbidden; automated must have Enterprise plan and approved API access

EVENT LIFECYCLE MUST BE MANAGED: Slido events have defined time windows (start/end); automated always-on Q&A assumption creates expired_event errors; automated must create events before sessions and archive after

MODERATION QUEUE IS DEFAULT: Slido Q&A has moderation enabled by default; automated immediate public display assumption creates questions stuck in moderation queue; automated must either disable moderation or implement approve workflow

WEBHOOK FOR REAL-TIME EVENTS: Slido offers webhooks for question upvotes and poll votes; automated polling-only assumption creates high-latency response; automated should use webhooks for real-time audience interaction signals
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise meeting engagement. GDPR, SOC 2, CCPA. OAuth2. EU/US. Meeting Q&A and engagement data. Cisco/Webex.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise meeting Q&A. GDPR, SOC 2. OAuth2. EU/US. Meeting and audience data. Cisco.
